eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 4:57 PM on JUN 30, 2026 Effective until 3:57 PM JUL 1, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pueblo County Alert: There is a mandatory evacuation of the North Creek area in Beulah encompassing Central Rd to the Custer County line. This may be your last chance to evacuate; please do not wait. Evacuate into Custer County.
